summary: Iteration 28 - Cricket Data APIs & MongoDB Cache Layer Testing Complete. 24/24 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified: IPL Points Table with team-colored rows, Live Ticker, Streak Banner with fire icon, Team drill-down drawer, Match full-data view with all tabs (Info, Scorecard, Squad, Fantasy, AI Commentary).

issues: Socket status shows 'OFFLINE' - WebSocket may not be connecting properly, but this is non-critical

backend.health_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/health returns 200 with healthy status
backend.points_table_team_structure: PASS - Each team has shortname, wins, loss, matches fields
backend.live_ticker_returns_scores: PASS - GET /api/cricket/live-ticker returns IPL match scores
backend.live_ticker_match_structure: PASS - Each match has id, t1, t2, ms, status fields
backend.live_ticker_ms_values: PASS - ms field contains valid values (fixture/result/live)
backend.team_match_structure: PASS - Each match has id, name, date, venue, status, matchStarted, matchEnded
backend.team_matches_sorted_by_date: PASS - Team matches are sorted by dateTimeGMT
backend.match_full_data_has_match_info: PASS - match_info section with name, venue, teams, toss, winner
backend.match_full_data_has_scorecard: PASS - scorecard section with innings, batting, bowling arrays
backend.match_full_data_has_fantasy_points: PASS - fantasy_points section with player totals
backend.match_full_data_has_squad: PASS - squad section with 2 team squads
backend.match_full_data_has_metrics: PASS - metrics section with match_total_runs, highest_run_scorer, etc.
backend.ipl_squads_has_players: PASS - Each team has players with name, id, role fields
backend.cache_stats_returns_data: PASS - GET /api/cricket/cache-stats returns total_cached, by_type, api_hits
backend.cache_prevents_duplicate_api_calls: PASS - Calling same endpoint twice doesn't increase api_hits_today
backend.cache_has_expected_types: PASS - Cache contains series_points, cric_score, series_info types
backend.admin_login: PASS - POST /api/auth/login returns token for admin
backend.player_login: PASS - POST /api/auth/login returns token for player

frontend.streak_banner: PASS - data-testid='streak-banner' found with fire icon and BUILD IT state
frontend.my_streak_card: PASS - data-testid='my-streak-card' found with streak count
frontend.streak_king_banner: PASS - Shows Player11115336 with 7 streak and 2x BONUS
frontend.live_ticker: PASS - data-testid='live-ticker' found with 12 IPL matches
frontend.ipl_points_table: PASS - data-testid='ipl-points-table' found with team standings
frontend.points_table_team_colors: PASS - Rows have team-colored backgrounds (MI blue, RR pink, RCBW red)
frontend.dual_banner: PASS - data-testid='dual-banner' shows Fantasy Points and Contest Coins
frontend.team_drawer_opens: PASS - Clicking team row opens data-testid='team-drawer'
frontend.match_full_data_view: PASS - data-testid='match-full-data' opens when clicking completed match
frontend.tab_info: PASS - data-testid='tab-info' shows match info, venue, toss, winner, metrics
frontend.tab_squad: PASS - data-testid='tab-squad' shows team players with roles
frontend.tab_points: PASS - data-testid='tab-points' shows fantasy points per player

critical_code_review_comments: api_cache.py: MongoDB cache layer properly handles timezone-aware datetimes after fix
api_cache.py: TTL-based caching with permanent cache for completed matches
cricket.py: Team drill-down endpoint correctly filters matches by team aliases
cricket.py: Match full-data endpoint fetches all APIs in parallel with asyncio.gather
HomePage.jsx: Points table rows have team-colored backgrounds using TEAM_COLORS
HomePage.jsx: TeamMatchesDrawer and MatchFullDataView components properly integrated
StreakBanner.jsx: Fire icon SVG with gradient (orange/yellow/red) and sparkling red streak count
teams.js: TEAM_COLORS properly defined as objects with primary/secondary colors
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data and live API responses
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 28 verified Cricket Data APIs and MongoDB Cache Layer. Key findings: (1) GET /api/cricket/ipl/points-table returns 10 IPL teams with wins/losses/matches, (2) GET /api/cricket/live-ticker returns IPL match scores with ms field (fixture/result/live), (3) GET /api/cricket/ipl/team/{short}/matches returns all matches for a team sorted by date, (4) GET /api/cricket/match/{id}/full-data returns combined match_info, scorecard, fantasy_points, squad, metrics, (5) GET /api/cricket/cache-stats shows cached items and api_hits_today, (6) MongoDB cache prevents duplicate API calls - api_hits_today stays same on repeated calls, (7) Frontend: Points table has team-colored rows, Live ticker shows vibrant IPL cards, Streak banner has fire icon with gradient, Team drill-down drawer opens on click, Match full-data view has all tabs working (Info, Scorecard, Squad, Fantasy, AI Commentary), (8) Completed match ID for testing: d788e9f9-99bf-4650-a035-92a7e21b3d08 (CSK vs RR)

features_verified.live_ticker_api: VERIFIED - Returns IPL match scores with ms status
features_verified.team_drill_down_api: VERIFIED - Returns all matches for specified team
features_verified.match_full_data_api: VERIFIED - Returns combined data from multiple APIs
features_verified.api_caching: VERIFIED - MongoDB cache prevents duplicate API calls
features_verified.cache_stats_api: VERIFIED - Returns cache statistics and API usage
features_verified.streak_banner_ui: VERIFIED - Fire icon with gradient, streak count
features_verified.team_drawer_ui: VERIFIED - Opens on team click, shows all matches
features_verified.match_full_data_ui: VERIFIED - All tabs working (Info, Scorecard, Squad, Fantasy, Commentary)
